prompt: Create a cinematic vertical luxury football champion portrait in a dark studio arena. A young adult man with short dark hair sits centered and facing forward on an enormous black iron throne inspired by a fantasy sword throne, made from dozens of overlapping steel blades and swords fanning upward behind him like a crown. He wears a plain black long-sleeved shirt, black jeans, and black-and-red high-top sneakers. His posture is powerful and relaxed: seated with legs apart, right hand gripping a gleaming FIFA World Cup trophy held upright near his knee, left forearm resting on the throne armrest. Place the throne on a circular glossy black metallic platform. Surround him with exactly 6 visible football awards and props on the platform: 2 large gold cup trophies standing at the far left and far right edges, 2 taller narrow gold trophies beside his feet, and 2 metallic gold footballs in the front left and front right corners. Add additional smaller gold football ornaments integrated into both throne armrests. Background: a vast dark stadium or arena with blurred crowd seating, cool blue stadium floodlights on both sides, deep black upper background, and subtle haze. Lighting should be dramatic and high contrast, with teal-blue rim light from the stadium and warm red-orange highlights on the throne, trophies, shoes, and platform edges. Style: ultra-realistic, premium sports editorial, heroic symmetrical composition, sharp metallic textures, glossy reflections, shallow depth of field, 9:16 vertical poster framing. Keep the face recognizable if a reference is provided, but do not add text, logos, watermarks, or extra people.
